sEn: Variants of Gated Linear Units improve Transformer quality over ReLU or GELU.
sZh: 门控线性单元（GLU）的变体在Transformer中优于常用的ReLU或GELU激活函数。
absEn: Gated Linear Units (arXiv:1612.08083) consist of the component-wise product of two linear projections, one of which is first passed through a sigmoid function. Variations on GLU are possible, using different nonlinear (or even linear) functions in place of sigmoid. We test these variants in the feed-forward sublayers of the Transformer (arXiv:1706.03762) sequence-to-sequence model, and find that some of them yield quality improvements over the typically-used ReLU or GELU activations.
absZh: 门控线性单元（GLU，arXiv:1612.08083）由两个线性投影的分量积组成，其中一个先经过sigmoid函数。GLU可以有多种变体，使用不同的非线性（甚至线性）函数代替sigmoid。我们在Transformer（arXiv:1706.03762）序列到序列模型的前馈子层中测试了这些变体，发现其中一些变体比通常使用的ReLU或GELU激活函数能带来质量提升。

contrib.en: Proposes GLU variants (GEGLU, SwiGLU) for Transformer FFN layers.
contrib.zh: 提出将GLU变体（GEGLU、SwiGLU）用于Transformer前馈网络层。

contrib.en: Shows GLU variants improve perplexity on denoising pre-training objective.
contrib.zh: 展示GLU变体在去噪预训练目标上提升了困惑度。

contrib.en: Demonstrates better downstream task performance on GLUE and SuperGLUE.
contrib.zh: 证明在GLUE和SuperGLUE下游任务上性能更优。

contrib.en: Maintains parameter count by reducing hidden size by 2/3 for three-matrix layers.
contrib.zh: 通过将三矩阵层的隐藏大小减少2/3来保持参数量不变。

contrib.en: Finds no dropout during pre-training yields superior results.
contrib.zh: 发现预训练期间不使用dropout可获得更优结果。

contrib.en: Provides simple implementation with no computational drawbacks.
contrib.zh: 提供简单实现且无计算缺陷。

limits.en: Only tested on encoder-decoder Transformer with T5-style pre-training.
limits.zh: 仅在编码器-解码器Transformer和T5式预训练上测试。

limits.en: No theoretical explanation for why GLU variants improve performance.
limits.zh: 未提供GLU变体提升性能的理论解释。

limits.en: Fine-tuning done on a single mixture of tasks, not per-task.
limits.zh: 微调在单一任务混合上进行，而非每个任务单独微调。

limits.en: Results may not generalize to other architectures or training setups.
limits.zh: 结果可能无法泛化到其他架构或训练设置。

limits.en: Limited to feed-forward sublayers; other Transformer components unchanged.
limits.zh: 仅限于前馈子层；Transformer其他组件未变。

items.en: Gated Linear Units [Dauphin et al., 2016] consist of the component-wise product of two linear projections, one of which is first passed through a sigmoid function. Variations on GLU are possible, using different nonlinear (or even linear) functions in place of sigmoid. We test these variants in the feed-forward sublayers of the Transformer [Vaswani et al., 2017] sequence-to-sequence model, and find that some of them yield quality improvements over the typically-used ReLU or GELU activations.
items.zh: 门控线性单元（GLU）[Dauphin et al., 2016] 由两个线性投影的分量级乘积组成，其中一个投影先经过 sigmoid 函数。GLU 的变体是可能的，使用不同的非线性（甚至线性）函数代替 sigmoid。我们在 Transformer [Vaswani et al., 2017] 序列到序列模型的前馈子层中测试这些变体，发现其中一些变体比通常使用的 ReLU 或 GELU 激活函数能带来质量提升。

items.en: The Transformer [Vaswani et al., 2017] sequence-to-sequence model alternates between multi-head attention, and what it calls "position-wise feed-forward networks" (FFN). The FFN takes a vector x𝑥x (the hidden representation at a particular position in the sequence) and passes it through two learned linear transformations, (represented by the matrices W1subscript𝑊1W_{1} and W2subscript𝑊2W_{2} and bias vectors b1subscript𝑏1b_{1} and b2subscript𝑏2b_{2}). A rectified-linear (ReLU) [Glorot et al., 2011] activation function applied between the two linear transformations.
items.zh: Transformer [Vaswani et al., 2017] 序列到序列模型在多头注意力机制和所谓的“位置前馈网络”（FFN）之间交替。FFN 接受一个向量 x（序列中特定位置的隐藏表示），并将其通过两个学习到的线性变换（由矩阵 W1 和 W2 以及偏置向量 b1 和 b2 表示）。在两个线性变换之间应用整流线性（ReLU）[Glorot et al., 2011] 激活函数。

items.en: Following the T5 codebase [Raffel et al., 2019] 111Also in the interest of ML fairness., we use a version with no bias:
items.zh: 遵循 T5 代码库 [Raffel et al., 2019]（同样出于机器学习公平性的考虑），我们使用无偏置版本：

items.en: Subsequent work has proposed replacing the ReLU with other nonlinear activation functions such as Gaussian Error Linear Units, GELU​(x)=x​Φ​(x)GELU𝑥𝑥Φ𝑥\textrm{GELU}(x)=x\Phi(x) [Hendrycks and Gimpel, 2016], and Swishβ​(x)=x​σ​(β​x)subscriptSwish𝛽𝑥𝑥𝜎𝛽𝑥\textrm{Swish}_{\beta}(x)=x\sigma(\beta x) [Ramachandran et al., 2017].
items.zh: 后续工作提出用其他非线性激活函数替换 ReLU，例如高斯误差线性单元 GELU(x)=xΦ(x) [Hendrycks and Gimpel, 2016] 和 Swish_β(x)=xσ(βx) [Ramachandran et al., 2017]。

full.secZh: 2 门控线性单元（GLU）及其变体

items.en: [Dauphin et al., 2016] introduced Gated Linear Units (GLU), a neural network layer defined as the component-wise product of two linear transformations of the input, one of which is sigmoid-activated. They also suggest omitting the activation, which they call a "bilinear" layer and attribute to [Mnih and Hinton, 2007].
items.zh: [Dauphin et al., 2016] 引入了门控线性单元（GLU），这是一种神经网络层，定义为输入的两个线性变换的分量级乘积，其中一个变换经过 sigmoid 激活。他们还建议省略激活函数，称之为“双线性”层，并将其归功于 [Mnih and Hinton, 2007]。

items.en: We can also define GLU variants using other activation functions:
items.zh: 我们还可以定义使用其他激活函数的 GLU 变体：

items.en: In this paper, we propose additional variations on the Transformer FFN layer which use GLU or one of its variants in place of the first linear transformation and the activation function. Again, we omit the bias terms.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 Transformer FFN 层的额外变体，这些变体使用 GLU 或其变体代替第一个线性变换和激活函数。同样，我们省略了偏置项。

items.en: All of these layers have three weight matrices, as opposed to two for the original FFN. To keep the number of parameters and the amount of computation constant, we reduce the number of hidden units df​fsubscript𝑑𝑓𝑓d_{ff} (the second dimension of W𝑊W and V𝑉V and the first dimension of W2subscript𝑊2W_{2}) by a factor of 2323\frac{2}{3} when comparing these layers to the original two-matrix version.
items.zh: 所有这些层都有三个权重矩阵，而原始 FFN 只有两个。为了保持参数数量和计算量不变，当将这些层与原始的两矩阵版本进行比较时，我们将隐藏单元数 d_ff（W 和 V 的第二维以及 W2 的第一维）减少 2/3。

full.secZh: 3 文本到文本迁移变换器（T5）的实验

items.en: We test the FFN variants we have described on the transfer-learning setup from [Raffel et al., 2019]. An encoder-decoder transformer model [Vaswani et al., 2017] is trained on a denoising objective of predicting missing text segments, and subsequently fine-tuned on various language understanding tasks.
items.zh: 我们在 [Raffel et al., 2019] 的迁移学习设置上测试了我们描述的 FFN 变体。一个编码器-解码器 Transformer 模型 [Vaswani et al., 2017] 在预测缺失文本片段的去噪目标上进行训练，随后在各种语言理解任务上进行微调。

items.en: We use the same code base, model architecture, and training task as the base model from [Raffel et al., 2019]. The encoder and decoder each consist of 12 layers, with dm​o​d​e​l=768subscript𝑑𝑚𝑜𝑑𝑒𝑙768d_{model}=768. For the attention layers, h=12ℎ12h=12 and dk=dv=64subscript𝑑𝑘subscript𝑑𝑣64d_{k}=d_{v}=64. The FFN layers have hidden size df​f=3072subscript𝑑𝑓𝑓3072d_{ff}=3072. As we describe above, for the GLU-variant-based FFN layers, which have thee weight matrices instead of two, we reduce the hidden layer to df​f=2048subscript𝑑𝑓𝑓2048d_{ff}=2048, so as to maintain the same parameter and operation counts as the base model.
items.zh: 我们使用与 [Raffel et al., 2019] 基础模型相同的代码库、模型架构和训练任务。编码器和解码器各由 12 层组成，d_model=768。对于注意力层，h=12，d_k=d_v=64。FFN 层的隐藏大小为 d_ff=3072。如上所述，对于基于 GLU 变体的 FFN 层，它们有三个权重矩阵而不是两个，我们将隐藏层减少到 d_ff=2048，以保持与基础模型相同的参数和操作数量。

items.en: Identically to [Raffel et al., 2019], we pre-train for 524,288 steps on the span-filling objective on the C4 dataset. Each training batch consists of 128 examples, each of which has an input of 512 tokens and an output of 114 tokens, the output containing multiple spans of tokens which were deleted from the input222Each training step took approximately 0.15 seconds on a 32-core TPUv2 cluster.. Similarly to [Raffel et al., 2019], we use the Adafactor optimizer [Shazeer and Stern, 2018] and an inverse-square-root learning-rate schedule. We also decay the learning rate linearly for the final 10 percent of the training steps. Our main departure from [Raffel et al., 2019] is that we use no dropout during pre-training. We find this to produce superior results. We compute the log-perplexity on the training objective on a heldout shard of C4, which we believe to be a good indicator of model quality. For each model architecture, we also trained four models for a shorter period (65,536 steps) to measure inter-run variability. The results are listed in table 1. The GEGLU and SwiGLU variants produce the best perplexities.
items.zh: 与 [Raffel et al., 2019] 完全相同，我们在 C4 数据集上以跨度填充目标预训练了 524,288 步。每个训练批次包含 128 个样本，每个样本的输入有 512 个 token，输出有 114 个 token，输出包含多个从输入中删除的 token 跨度。与 [Raffel et al., 2019] 类似，我们使用 Adafactor 优化器 [Shazeer and Stern, 2018] 和逆平方根学习率调度。我们还在训练步骤的最后 10% 线性衰减学习率。我们与 [Raffel et al., 2019] 的主要不同之处在于，我们在预训练期间不使用 dropout。我们发现这会产生更好的结果。我们在 C4 的保留分片上计算训练目标的对数困惑度，我们认为这是模型质量的良好指标。对于每种模型架构，我们还训练了四个模型，时间较短（65,536 步），以衡量运行间变异性。结果列于表 1。GEGLU 和 SwiGLU 变体产生了最好的困惑度。

items.en: We then fine-tune each fully-trained model once on an examples-proportional mixture of the Stanford Question-Answering Dataset (SQuAD) [Rajpurkar et al., 2016] and all the language understanding tasks in the GLUE [Wang et al., 2018] and SuperGlue [Wang et al., 2019] benchmarks.333This departs from [Raffel et al., 2019], who fine-tuned separately on the different tasks. We chose one fine-tuning run for simplicity. Fine-tuning consists of 131072 steps with a learning rate of 10−3superscript10310^{-3}. As in training, the input sequences for each step have a combined length of approximately 65,536 tokens. Following [Raffel et al., 2019], we use a dropout rate of 0.10.10.1 on the layer outputs, feed-forward hidden-layers and attention weights. The embedding matrices are fixed during fine-tuning.
items.zh: 然后，我们在斯坦福问答数据集（SQuAD）[Rajpurkar et al., 2016] 以及 GLUE [Wang et al., 2018] 和 SuperGlue [Wang et al., 2019] 基准测试中所有语言理解任务的示例比例混合上，对每个完全训练的模型进行一次微调。微调包括 131,072 步，学习率为 10^{-3}。与训练一样，每一步的输入序列总长度约为 65,536 个 token。遵循 [Raffel et al., 2019]，我们在层输出、前馈隐藏层和注意力权重上使用 0.1 的 dropout 率。微调期间嵌入矩阵固定。

items.en: We have extended the GLU family of layers and proposed their use in Transformer. In a transfer-learning setup, the new variants seem to produce better perplexities for the de-noising objective used in pre-training, as well as better results on many downstream language-understanding tasks. These architectures are simple to implement, and have no apparent computational drawbacks. We offer no explanation as to why these architectures seem to work; we attribute their success, as all else, to divine benevolence.
items.zh: 我们扩展了 GLU 层族，并提出了它们在 Transformer 中的使用。在迁移学习设置中，新变体似乎在预训练中使用的去噪目标上产生了更好的困惑度，并且在许多下游语言理解任务上也取得了更好的结果。这些架构易于实现，并且没有明显的计算缺陷。我们无法解释这些架构为何有效；我们将它们的成功，如同其他一切，归因于神圣的恩赐。
